expectedClassifications.notes: Fires an analytics network call (sendPosthogEvent) when pathname/userId changes. The ref (lastSentRef) is a dedup guard to prevent double-firing, not DOM manipulation. This is a legitimate necessary side effect -- it must be an effect because side effects during render double-fire in StrictMode. The interpreter misclassifies as DOM_EFFECT because it sees ref.current access and applies the DOM rule. Source: DashboardLayout.tsx
